message:
feat(mvcc): add RCU primitives for lock-free metadata reads (bd-18gn)

Implement RcuCell<T>, RcuMap<K,V>, and AtomicWatermark using arc-swap
for zero-lock reader paths. Integrate AtomicWatermark into SnapshotRegistry
so GC can query the oldest active snapshot without acquiring any lock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -115,7 +115,7 @@ checksum = "7c02d123df017efcdfbd739ef81735b36c5ba83ec3c59c80a9d7ecc718f92e50"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
-version = "0.2.2"
+version = "0.2.3"
 dependencies = [
  "base64",
  "bincode",
@@ -683,6 +683,7 @@ dependencies = [
 name = "ffs-mvcc"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
+ "arc-swap",
  "asupersync",
  "crc32c",
  "criterion",

@@ -47,6 +47,7 @@ doc_markdown = { level = "allow", priority = 1 }
 [workspace.dependencies]
 # External dependencies
 anyhow = "1.0.97"
+arc-swap = "1.7.1"
 bitflags = "2.9.0"
 blake3 = "1.6.0"
 clap = { version = "4.5.0", features = ["derive"] }
